login.title: Welcome back.
login.subtitle: Sign in with your OpenEOS account.

highlights.head: Admin interface
highlights.mobileCopy: Run it on phone or tablet — anywhere on the venue.
highlights.qrOrderCopy: Guests order via QR themselves — less waiting, more revenue.
highlights.shiftsCopy: Plan shifts, volunteers sign up online — fully automatic.
highlights.statsCopy: Revenue, best sellers, wait times — always in the loop.

errors.accountLocked: Your account has been locked. Please try again later.

register.title: Create your account.
register.subtitle: Sign up for OpenEOS
register.successCopy: We've sent a confirmation to {email}. Click the link to activate your account.

account.label: Account
account.title: Your account
account.copy: Email address and password for your OpenEOS account.
account.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, upper- and lowercase, and a number.

personal.label: You
personal.title: About you
personal.copy: So we know who we're dealing with — for invoices and support.

organization.label: Organization
organization.title: Your organization
organization.copy: Club, event organizer or business. You can also skip this and create an organization later.
organization.name: Organization name (optional)
organization.hint: Will appear on invoices and receipts. Can be changed later.

confirm.label: Confirmation
confirm.title: Final check
confirm.copy: Please review your details and accept the terms.
confirm.terms: I accept the Terms and Privacy Policy.
confirm.newsletter: I'd like to receive occasional updates.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.emailTaken: This email is already in use
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset link
forgotPassword.success: If an account exists with this email, you will receive an email shortly
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account exists with this email, you will receive an email shortly with a link to reset your password.

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password
resetPassword.success: Your password has been changed successfully
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been changed successfully. You can now sign in.
resetPassword.invalidTokenMessage: This link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new link.
resetPassword.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

twoFactor.emailSent: Verification code sent to your email
twoFactor.recoveryCodesDescription: Store these codes safely. They can be used to access your account if you lose access to your 2FA method.
twoFactor.disableConfirmDescription: Your account will be less secure without two-factor authentication.

sessions.title: Active Sessions
sessions.revokeAllDescription: You will be signed out on all other devices.

options.autoPrintReceiptDescription: Automatically print a receipt after each order

credentials.title: Credentials
credentials.description: API key and merchant code for the SumUp integration
